talking_points: U.S. stocks fell this week — S&P 500 -2.4% (1-month -2.6%); Nasdaq -4.5%, small caps +1.4%.
Sectors: Health Care led (+7.8%), Technology lagged (-5.3%).
Rates: 10y Treasury at 4.4%, 2s10s 0.31. Fed funds 3.5–3.75%; the 1y market implies ~33.0 bps over 12m.

Options: SPY dealer gamma is negative (vol-amplifying) — moves can accelerate.
